subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, the Ever-Living, the Ancient, Who transcendeth all description and veneration, and Who is sanctified beyond all glorification [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الحی القدیم المتعالی عن التوصیف و التکریم و المقدس عن التمجید و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of prayer, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
